tiny_practice.action: Close your eyes and silently surrender your plans to God, imagining releasing each thought into His hands

two_step.reflect_question: How do my current plans align with God's purpose?

options.response: Pause and pray, seeking divine guidance

options.text: I'm somewhat open to God's leading
options.response: Journal about areas where you need more surrender

options.text: I consistently seek God's wisdom first
options.response: Continue practicing intentional prayer and biblical reflection

creative_prompt.instruction: Draw a scale representing God's perfect balance between human plans and divine sovereignty

reevaluation.question: After reading Proverbs 16, how has my understanding of personal planning changed?
options: I now see my plans as collaborative with God
I recognize the importance of humility
I understand God's ultimate control more clearly
I'm more aware of my tendency toward self-reliance

three_choice.question: Which spiritual insight resonates most deeply with you?

choices.expansion: Recognizing that ultimate purpose transcends individual human intentions.

choices.text: Inner motivations matter more than external actions
choices.expansion: God examines the heart's true orientation beyond superficial behaviors.

choices.text: Humility as a fundamental spiritual virtue
choices.expansion: Pride disrupts relationship with God and invites spiritual consequences.

socratic_nudge.question: If all your ways seem pure to you, what mechanisms exist to challenge your own self-perception?

moral_slider.question: How do human free will and divine providence coexist?

reevaluation.question: How has your understanding of personal agency and divine guidance shifted?
options: Recognize more limitations in my own perspective
Understand divine guidance as collaborative, not controlling
See pride as a significant spiritual obstacle
Appreciate the complexity of spiritual discernment

thematic_summaries.title: Divine Sovereignty and Human Responsibility
thematic_summaries.summary: God ultimately controls human outcomes while simultaneously respecting human free will. Proverbs 16 emphasizes that while humans plan, God directs and determines the ultimate result of their actions.

thematic_summaries.title: Spiritual Discernment of Heart Motives
thematic_summaries.summary: True wisdom involves understanding that external actions are less important than internal heart motivations. God penetrates beyond human appearances to evaluate genuine spiritual intent and character.

reevaluation.question: How does divine providence interact with human decision-making according to Proverbs 16?
options: Humans have total free will with no divine intervention
God guides human decisions while respecting human agency
Divine plans override human intentions without exception
